mapper.select: SELECT area_name AS areaName, create_time AS createTime FROM aro_access_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND area_name IS NOT NULL
SELECT room_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM aro_access_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND area_name LIKE '%浦东%' AND room_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY room_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT room_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM aro_access_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND area_name LIKE '%浦西%' AND room_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY room_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT id, accessType, create_time, name, user_type_names, project_group_names, area_name, room_name FROM aro_access_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 99999
SELECT * FROM aro_personnel ORDER BY has_official_room_permission DESC, total_exp DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aro_personnel

SELECT id, accessType, create_time, name, user_type_names, project_group_names, area_name, room_name, is_shared_card, is_keep_card, is_borrowed_card FROM aro_access_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aro_access_log

SELECT id, accessType, create_time, user_id, name, user_type_names, project_group_names, area_name, floor_name, room_id, room_name, is_shared_card, is_keep_card, is_borrowed_card, feed_source, feed_summary_zh, feed_detail_zh, device_display_name FROM aro_access_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT name, head, project_group_name FROM aro_personnel WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aro_animal_order (sn, area_name, project_name, pi_name, quantity, male_quantity, female_quantity, order_state, create_time, arrival_date) VALUES (#{sn}, #{areaName}, #{projectName}, #{piName}, #{quantity}, #{maleQuantity}, #{femaleQuantity}, #{orderState}, #{createTime}, #{arrivalDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE area_name = VALUES(area_name), project_name = VALUES(project_name), pi_name = VALUES(pi_name), quantity = VALUES(quantity), male_quantity = VALUES(male_quantity), female_quantity = VALUES(female_quantity), order_state = VALUES(order_state), create_time = VALUES(create_time), arrival_date = VALUES(arrival_date)

INSERT INTO aro_animal_order ( item_id, sn, area_name, project_name, pi_name, create_time, arrival_date, supplier_name, strain_name, spec_name, male_qty, female_qty, collector_name, collector_tel, order_state_name, consume_location, memo ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{sn}, #{areaName}, #{projectName}, #{piName}, #{createTime}, #{arrivalDate}, #{supplierName}, #{strainName}, #{specName}, #{maleQty}, #{femaleQty}, #{collectorName}, #{collectorTel}, #{orderStateName}, #{consumeLocation}, #{memo} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sn = VALUES(sn), area_name = VALUES(area_name), project_name = VALUES(project_name), pi_name = VALUES(pi_name), create_time = VALUES(create_time), arrival_date = VALUES(arrival_date), supplier_name = VALUES(supplier_name), strain_name = VALUES(strain_name), spec_name = VALUES(spec_name), male_qty = VALUES(male_qty), female_qty = VALUES(female_qty), collector_name = VALUES(collector_name), collector_tel = VALUES(collector_tel), order_state_name = VALUES(order_state_name), consume_location = VALUES(consume_location), memo = VALUES(memo)
mapper.select: SELECT project_name AS projectName, SUM(male_qty + female_qty) AS totalQty, SUM(male_qty) AS maleQty, SUM(female_qty) AS femaleQty, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') THEN (male_qty + female_qty) ELSE 0 END) AS monthQty FROM aro_animal_order WHERE project_name = #{projectName} AND pi_name = #{piName}

SELECT log.id AS logId, log.user_id AS userId, log.name AS userName, log.project_group_names AS groupName, log.area_name AS areaName, log.room_name AS roomName, log.room_id AS roomId, log.create_time AS enterTime, ai.median_duration_mins AS aiDurationMins, ai.overtime_prob AS aiOvertimeProb, log.is_shared_card, log.is_keep_card, log.is_borrowed_card, CASE WHEN m.aro_user_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS has_physical_card_mapping, CASE WHEN m.aro_user_id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(log.is_borrowed_card, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_own_card, COALESCE(m.freeze_exempt_flag, 0) AS freeze_exempt_flag FROM aro_access_log log LEFT JOIN twin_card_mapping m ON m.aro_user_id = log.user_id LEFT JOIN aro_behavior_prediction ai ON log.user_id = ai.user_id AND log.room_id = ai.room_id AND ai.day_type = 'ALL_DAYS' WHERE log.accessType = 1 AND log.create_time >= CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 00:00:00') AND log.area_name LIKE #{areaPattern} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM aro_access_log out_log WHERE out_log.user_id = log.user_id AND out_log.room_id = log.room_id AND out_log.accessType IN (2, 3) AND out_log.create_time > log.create_time ) ORDER BY log.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM aro_behavior_prediction ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM aro_access_log WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT user_id, name, room_id, room_name, accessType AS access_type, create_time FROM aro_access_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND create_time IS NOT NULL AND room_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT DISTINCT project_group_names FROM aro_access_log WHERE project_group_names IS NOT NULL AND project_group_names != ''

SELECT user_id, room_id, room_name, area_name, accessType AS access_type, create_time FROM aro_access_log WHERE project_group_names = #{groupName} AND create_time IS NOT NULL AND room_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT project_group_names AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM aro_access_log WHERE create_time >= #{startTime} AND area_name LIKE '%浦东%' AND area_name LIKE '%浦西%' AND project_group_names IS NOT NULL AND project_group_names != '' AND project_group_names NOT LIKE '%卢今%' AND accessType = 1 GROUP BY project_group_names ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT room_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM aro_access_log WHERE create_time >= #{todayStart} AND area_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{area}, '%') AND room_name IS NOT NULL AND accessType = 1 GROUP BY room_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aro_access_log WHERE create_time >= #{todayStart} AND area_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{area}, '%') AND accessType = 1
SELECT create_time, area_name FROM aro_access_log WHERE create_time >= #{todayStart} AND accessType = 1

if.test: (campusList == null or campusList.size() == 0) and campus != null and campus != ''
(floorList == null or floorList.size() == 0) and floor != null and floor != ''

sql.if: AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM twin_blacklist)

mapper.select:
SELECT user_id AS userId, name, accessType, create_time AS createTime, area_name AS areaName, room_name AS roomName, room_id AS roomId, project_group_names AS projectGroupNames FROM aro_access_log WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 300000

SELECT COUNT(id) AS totalLogs, SUM(CASE WHEN accessType = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalEnter, SUM(CASE WHEN accessType = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalExit, SUM(CASE WHEN is_borrowed_card = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalBorrowed, SUM(CASE WHEN is_keep_card = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalKeep FROM aro_access_log WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT user_id AS userId, name, reason, create_time AS createTime FROM twin_blacklist ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_blacklist (user_id, name, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{reason}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), reason = VALUES(reason)
mapper.select: SELECT a.user_id, a.name AS userName, a.room_id AS roomId, a.room_name AS roomName, a.area_name AS areaName, a.is_borrowed_card, DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS entryTime FROM aro_access_log a INNER JOIN ( SELECT user_id, MAX(create_time) AS max_time FROM aro_access_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY user_id ) latest ON a.user_id = latest.user_id AND a.create_time = latest.max_time WHERE a.accessType = 1 AND a.room_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.area_name, a.room_name, a.create_time DESC

SELECT MIN(r.official_permission_level) AS minLvl, MAX(r.official_permission_level) AS maxLvl FROM aro_access_log a INNER JOIN room_mapping_room r ON a.room_id = r.room_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.accessType = 1 AND a.create_time LIKE #{todayPrefix} AND r.official_permission_level IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE aro_access_log SET feed_source = #{feedSource}, feed_summary_zh = #{feedSummaryZh}, feed_detail_zh = #{feedDetailZh}, device_display_name = COALESCE(#{deviceDisplayName}, device_display_name) WHERE id = #{id} AND (feed_source IS NULL OR TRIM(feed_source) = '')
mapper.select: SELECT feed_source AS feedSource, feed_summary_zh AS feedSummaryZh, feed_detail_zh AS feedDetailZh, device_display_name AS deviceDisplayName FROM aro_access_log WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT room_id, room_name FROM aro_group_room_prediction WHERE room_id NOT LIKE 'SUITE_%' ORDER BY room_name ASC
SELECT room_name FROM aro_group_room_prediction WHERE room_id = #{roomId} LIMIT 1
SELECT group_name, room_id, room_name, peak_entry_time, peak_exit_time, heatmap_matrix_json FROM aro_group_room_prediction WHERE room_id IN (#{roomId}, #{suiteId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aro_room_settings (room_id, max_capacity) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{capacity}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE max_capacity = VALUES(max_capacity)
